endpoints.description: Suning product review-satisfaction JSONP endpoint. Build the URL from product links as general-<commodityCode>-<shopCode>-----satisfy.htm to get goodRate, totalCount, qualityStar, and star-count fields without opening login-gated product detail pages.
strategy_notes: Extract commodityCode and shopCode from product.suning.com/<shopCode>/<commodityCode>.html links.
Use this after the search/list page has visible candidate products that satisfy keyword, price, size/capacity, and spec filters.
Rank candidates by goodRate first, then totalCount or visible review count as a tie-breaker.

runtime_strategies.name: suning_list_then_review_satisfy
runtime_strategies.trigger: Suning product-search tasks that ask for score, good-rate, rating, or top-rated products.

actions.description: Only after the list page is loaded, extract visible product cards and active filters; do not force hidden price/filter controls.
For top eligible product URLs, call review_satisfy to get goodRate and totalCount.

observable_validation: The search/list URL or visible chips prove the requested keyword and price/spec filters.
Product cards expose product URLs from which commodityCode and shopCode can be parsed.
review_satisfy compact output returns goodRate/totalCount before ranking by user score.
notes: If detail pages redirect to login, stay on the list page plus review_satisfy data and mark missing detail fields as not shown.
